not_supported: The requested causal control has not been launched because the Phase 3 gate failed.
supported: A targeted matched-mask causal design is specified.

not_supported: A validated universal scalar gamma*_ICL law.
supported: The ambiguous fixed-m20 tree_geometry numbers are different regressions and now have separate names.
Tree-level and tree-difference multiplicity metrics are implemented in the rooted tree-sum basis.
Existing fixed-m20 data show tree/difference multiplicity can predict mean novel-class ICL better than edge-level multiplicity in grouped LOO screens.

not_supported: Motif uniqueness or a universal mechanism law.
supported: Mechanism metrics are treated as post-training outcomes/descriptors, not pre-training predictors.

not_supported: Any F_max sweep result or entropy-production claim.
supported: Existing arbitrary directed-rate runs are explicitly excluded from thermodynamic force-budget claims.

not_supported: A claim that gamma*_ICL predicts best-seed ICL; toy validation failed first.
supported: Mean, best-seed, and seed-standard-deviation outcomes are separated in the reports.
Hard full-mask data include trained branch-margin and branch-failure outcomes for grouped screens.
